target: Compare avmatrix-go and E:\avmatrix-main on Go-heavy and TypeScript-heavy repos

notes: avmatrix-main was run against E:\AVmatrix-GO, not against E:\avmatrix-main.
avmatrix-main reports Go language scopeResolutionReferenceSites=0 for this repo, so Go resolution counters are not semantically equivalent.
Both engines were run against E:\Website.
avmatrix-main reports 100% AST-reused ScopeIR coverage for JavaScript and TypeScript files in this repo, so this scenario is more objective for TS-heavy comparison than the Go-heavy self repo.
Top-level runs are kept for backward compatibility and refer to the AVmatrix-GO self-analyze scenario.
Full raw payloads for every scenario are embedded under scenarios.<name>.runs.
Temporary raw benchmark files for E:\Website were merged into this JSON and can be regenerated from the commands in each scenario.
